title: Senior Frontend Developer at Vodafone Idea

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Vodafone Idea
jsonLd.description:
Join the Vodafone Idea family as a Frontend Developer in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Vodafone Idea:
Vodafone Idea is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vodafone Idea!
